description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fommil/docker-openjdk-sbt:latest Docker image, defines the variables COURSIER_CACHE and SBT_TASK_LIMIT, and includes two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_job that uses a cache with key "default" pulling the path project/.sbt, is excluded on the master branch, and runs the script: if $(git grep -qE "TODO|FIXME" *) ; then echo "Please remove TODO or FIXME." ; exit 1 ; fi, then sbt ";+check ;+cpl ;+lint ;+test", then cd scalafix ; sbt tests/test. In the deploy stage add a deploy_job that also uses the same cache, runs only on the master branch and not on tags, and executes sbt ";+update;+publish" followed by cd scalafix ; sbt update.
